digest.component_or_area: ticket audit-trail web UI (optional rebar audit serve)
propositions: Deliver an optional, disabled-by-default, read-only local web UI that renders a single ticket's automated LLM review audit trail (ticket details plus plan, completion, and code panels).
The UI must show each review's full four-pass breakdown including per-finding resolved thresholds and the completion criteria[] rows.
The page must be navigable across retained plan-review and code-review history, allowing selection of an older (not just latest) round of each gate with distinct content rendering.
The UI is a pure consumer of enriched fields delivered by the data-enrichment epic (Epic 1) and must not render a region until its field source has landed.
Reuse the existing reviewbot FastAPI + Jinja2 web stack, bound to loopback only with no client build step, rather than adding a second framework or a static HTML export.
When disabled by default or the [ui] extra is absent, rebar behaves exactly as today with no new import cost and import rebar unaffected.
